markdown:
#  Budget And Forecast Snapshots User Guide 
Table of Contents 
##  Change Snapshot Status 
  1. Navigate to the Company level **Project Status Snapshots** tool.
  2. Locate the project status snapshot in the table.
  3. Click the snapshot's **Status** cell and choose the desired status. This updates the snapshot status at both the company and project levels. 
![Project Status Snapshots](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/793796c059f404957877352cc335e5ce/0f601c11558bf85b4249fff67fb5d8f6/project-status-snapshots.png?fm=webp)
